zh.lifeSummary: 當Isolda De Walton於1277年出生在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫時，她的父親John de Walton33歲，母親Isolda de Stratford19歲。她於大約1295年與John le Strange VI 2nd Lord Strange of Knockin結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1324年5月18日之後在英國史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isolda De Walton于1277年出生在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫时，她的父亲John de Walton33岁，母亲Isolda de Stratford19岁。她于大约1295年与John le Strange VI 2nd Lord Strange of Knockin结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1324年5月18日之后在英国史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Walton, which are named with Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala), wald ‘woodland’, wall ‘wall’, or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

History: George Walton (1741–1804) signed the Declaration of Independence. He was born in Prince Edward County, VA, whither his grandfather had emigrated from England in 1682. He moved to Savannah, GA, and became governor of GA and a prominent jurist.

nameMeanings.name: Isolda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Isolda De Walton was born in 1277, in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, her father, John de Walton, was 33 and her mother, Isolda de Stratford, was 19. She married John le Strange VI 2nd Lord Strange of Knockin about 1295. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 18 May 1324, in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isolda De Walton est née en 1277, à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Walton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isolda de Stratford, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John le Strange VI 2nd Lord Strange of Knockin environ 1295. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 18 mai 1324, à Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Isolda De Waltonが1277年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアで生まれた時，父John de Waltonは33歳，母Isolda de Stratfordは19歳であった。約1295年にJohn le Strange VI 2nd Lord Strange of Knockinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1324年5月18日以後にイギリスシュロプシュアイアノクイン イン オスウエストリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isolda De Walton(이)가 1277년 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Walton(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isolda de Stratford(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 John le Strange VI 2nd Lord Strange of Knockin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 5월 18일 이후 영국 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스w스트리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isolda De Walton nasceu em 1277, em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Walton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isolda de Stratford, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John le Strange VI 2nd Lord Strange of Knockin aproximadamente 1295. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 18 de maio de 1324, em Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Stratford-upon-Avon, Warwickshire, Engla: стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isolda De Walton родилась в 1277 г. в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Walton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isolda de Stratford, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Strange VI 2nd Lord Strange of Knockin около 1295 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 18 май 1324 г. в местности ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия.
